_meta.purpose: Korea's bilateral and regional FTAs with chapter-level applicability for Landed Cost Calculator estimates
_meta.source: Korea Ministry of Trade, Industry and Energy (MOTIE) FTA portal + WTO RTA database; consult destination broker for product-specific HS6/HS8 rates
_meta.important_note: FTA status here is chapter-level GENERAL. Product-specific rates depend on rules of origin, certificate of origin issuance, and HS6/HS8 schedule. Always verify with destination broker before binding pricing.
_meta.rate_basis: Estimates show preferential ad-valorem AVERAGE under FTA vs MFN baseline. Real product rates can vary ±100% from average.

ftas.name: Korea-United States FTA
ftas.notes: ~95% of US tariff lines duty-free immediately or staged-in by 2026. Notable carve-outs: certain textiles, some agriculture.

ftas.name: Korea-Canada FTA
ftas.notes: 98% of tariff lines duty-free by 2025. Most consumer + industrial goods qualify.

ftas.name: Korea-Chile FTA
ftas.notes: Korea's first FTA. Nearly all industrial + consumer goods duty-free.

ftas.name: Korea-EU FTA
ftas.notes: Industrial goods near-universally duty-free. Some agricultural + textile carve-outs remain.

ftas.name: Korea-United Kingdom FTA
ftas.notes: Replicates KEUFTA preferences post-Brexit. Industrial goods near-universally duty-free.

ftas.name: Korea-ASEAN FTA
ftas.notes: Staged liberalisation completed for most products. Bilateral KVNFTA / KIDFTA may offer better rates for specific HS lines.

ftas.name: Korea-Vietnam FTA
ftas.notes: Bilateral upgrade over KAFTA. ~92% of tariff lines duty-free by 2026.

ftas.name: Korea-Indonesia CEPA
ftas.notes: Recent CEPA — 92% of tariff lines duty-free over 20 years; immediate cuts on auto, steel, electronics.

ftas.name: Regional Comprehensive Economic Partnership
ftas.notes: Korea-Japan tariff reduction is RCEP's headline (no prior bilateral FTA). Staged 20-year reduction for most lines.

ftas.name: Korea-UAE CEPA
ftas.notes: Signed 2024. Verify ratification status before claiming preferential treatment. GCC common external tariff applies in interim.

no_fta.note: No Korea FTA in force. MFN rates apply. Korea-Mexico, Korea-Mercosur, and Korea-GCC negotiations ongoing as of 2026-Q2.
